_source: Investopedia, CMT Association, Jane Street alum talks, Institutional investor research
_note: Long-tail trading strategy data. Specific rules, not generic descriptions.

sma_200.rule: Price above SMA200 = bullish; price below = bearish
sma_200.golden_cross: SMA50 crosses above SMA200; bullish signal; S&P 500 has +12% avg 12-month return after
sma_200.death_cross: SMA50 crosses below SMA200; bearish; S&P 500 has -2% avg 12-month return after
sma_200.limitation: Lagging indicator; trades the past; significant lag at reversals

moving_averages.ema_vs_sma: EMA weights recent prices more; faster signal; more false positives. SMA smoother; less noise.

vwap.trading_rule: Institutions buy below VWAP (getting good execution); sell above VWAP
vwap.day_trading_use: Price above VWAP = bullish for day; below = bearish; strong breakouts start from VWAP

rsi_relative_strength_index.formula: 100 - [100 / (1 + RS)] where RS = avg gain / avg loss over 14 periods

overbought_oversold.caveat: Trending stocks stay overbought/oversold for extended periods; confirmation needed

divergence.bullish: Price makes lower low; RSI makes higher low; momentum diverging; potential reversal up
divergence.bearish: Price makes higher high; RSI makes lower high; losing momentum; potential reversal down

rsi_relative_strength_index.2_period_rsi: Larry Connors variant; below 5 = extreme oversold bounce signal; short-term mean reversion

bollinger_bands.squeeze: Bands narrow = low volatility period; typically precedes big move in either direction
bollinger_bands.walk_the_band: Strong trend: price consistently touches upper/lower band; don't fade it
bollinger_bands.mean_reversion: Price beyond bands tends to return to middle (only in ranging markets)

support_resistance.volume_profile: High volume nodes = strong support/resistance; price attracted to high-volume areas
support_resistance.previous_all_time_high: Once broken, prior resistance becomes support; and vice versa

momentum.cross_sectional_momentum: Buy top 10% performers over past 12 months; short bottom 10%; monthly rebalance
momentum.time_series_momentum: If asset up over 12 months, go long; if down, avoid or short
momentum.academic_evidence: Fama-French: momentum factor +8.3% premium annualized; strong but crashes (2009, 2020)
momentum.implementation: Sort S&P 500 by 12-1 month return (skip last month); long top decile

mean_reversion.pairs_trading: Cointegrated pairs; when spread widens beyond 2 std dev, expect convergence
mean_reversion.statistical_arbitrage: Use co-integration testing (ADF test); pairs: Coke/Pepsi, JPM/GS, XOM/CVX
mean_reversion.half_life: How long spread takes to revert; if half-life > 30 days, trade may tie up capital too long

value_factor.book_to_market_sort: Buy lowest P/B stocks; sell highest P/B; annual rebalance
value_factor.earnings_yield: E/P (inverse of PE); sort high to low; long high-yield; cheap vs expensive
value_factor.implementation_note: Value factor had decade-long underperformance (2010-2020); revived 2022+

vix_strategies.sell_vix_spikes: VIX > 30 + VIX > VXMT = sell volatility (buy SPX calls); mean-reverts quickly
vix_strategies.short_vix: SVXY/UVXY inverse products; collect VIX roll yield; blows up in crisis
vix_strategies.calendar_spread: Sell near VIX; buy far VIX; profit from term structure

market_making.bid_ask_spread: Profit is the spread; risk is inventory accumulation
market_making.adverse_selection: Only trades with informed traders against you; protect with wider spread on large orders
market_making.delta_hedging: Immediately hedge directional risk; profit from spread not direction

probabilistic_thinking.expected_value: Every trade is an EV bet: P(win)*reward - P(loss)*risk; take any positive EV trade
probabilistic_thinking.kelly_sizing: Bet fraction proportional to edge; don't bet 100% even with 90% win rate
probabilistic_thinking.think_in_distributions: Not 'will it go up?' but 'what's the full probability distribution of outcomes?'

position_sizing.1_pct_rule: Never risk more than 1-2% of portfolio on single trade
position_sizing.volatility_sizing: Position size = Risk_Amount / (ATR * 1.5); adjust for volatility
position_sizing.kelly_criterion_practical: Use half-Kelly; full Kelly too volatile for 95%+ of traders

stop_losses.technical_stop: Below key support level or recent swing low
stop_losses.time_stop: Exit if trade hasn't worked in planned timeframe (e.g., 10 days)

portfolio_limits.sector_concentration: No more than 25% in single sector
portfolio_limits.correlation_limit: Avoid portfolio of highly correlated positions (all tech in 2022)
portfolio_limits.drawdown_halt: Pre-define: at 10% portfolio drawdown, reduce size 50%; at 20%, stop trading
